topic: Cold email strategies for reaching facilities managers
coreInsight: Facilities managers delete generic cleaning emails immediately. The emails that get responses are short, specific to the building type, and ask one simple question. Response rates jump to 4–6% when the email is under 80 words and references their industry.
targetAudience: Facilities managers in offices, healthcare, and education
cta: Download the CleanReach facilities manager cold email template

topic: Why cleaning companies lose commercial contracts to smaller competitors
coreInsight: Facilities managers don't always choose the biggest or cheapest company. They choose the one that makes them feel most confident about reliability. A clear onboarding process and a dedicated account contact often win over price.
